zh.Conington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾康寧頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna de Brus於1338年出生在英國盧特藍德艾可頓時，她的父親Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington21歲，母親Margaret de Hardreshull11335歲。她和Nicholas de Grene至少有2個女兒。她去世於1421年6月28日在她的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.Conington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国亨廷格多史爾康寧頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna de Brus于1338年出生在英国盧特藍德艾可頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington21岁，母亲Margaret de Hardreshull11335岁。她和Nicholas de Grene至少有2个女儿。她去世于1421年6月28日在她的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna de Brus was born in 1338, in Exton, Rutland, England, her father, Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington, was 21 and her mother, Margaret de Hardreshull, was 11335. She had at least 2 daughters with Nicholas de Grene. She died on 28 June 1421, in her hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna de Brus est née en 1338, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Hardreshull, avait 11335 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Nicholas de Grene. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna de Brus 1338 in Exton, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Hardreshull 11335. Sie hatte mit Nicholas de Grene mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Juni 1421 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Brus è nata il nel 1338 nel Exton, Rutland, England, sua padre, Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Hardreshull, aveva 11335 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Nicholas de Grene. Morì il 28 giugno 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.Exton, Rutland, England: イギリスルトランドエクストン
ja.lifeSummary: Johanna de Brusが1338年にイギリスルトランドエクストンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Brus Lord of Coningtonは21歳，母Margaret de Hardreshullは11335歳であった。彼女はNicholas de Greneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1421年6月28日に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna de Brus(이)가 1338년 영국 루틀랜드 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Hardreshull(은)는 11335세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas de Grene(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 6월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Brus nasceu em 1338, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Hardreshull, tinha 11335 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Nicholas de Grene. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna de Brus родилась в 1338 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Hardreshull, 11335. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Nicholas de Grene. Она умерла 28 июня 1421 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna de Brus nació en 1338, en Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Brus Lord of Conington, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret de Hardreshull, tenía 11335 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Nicholas de Grene. Murió el 28 de junio de 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
